remember: Recall the various factors that affect the business environment
List and explain different types of business environment
Identify the internal and external factors of the business environment
understand: Explain the importance of business environment in decision-making
Describe how business environment influences the business activities
Discuss the impact of business environment on the growth and development of business
apply: Apply the knowledge of business environment to explain the strategies adopted by business
Use the concept of business environment to analyze the strengths and weaknesses of business
Compare the business environment of different countries
analyze: Analyze the impact of government policies on the business environment
Examine the role of technology in shaping the business environment
Evaluate the effect of social and cultural factors on the business environment

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of business environment and its importance in business decision-making.
Describe the internal and external factors of the business environment.
Discuss the impact of business environment on the growth and development of business.
board_exam_objectives: Identify and explain the factors that affect the business environment.
Discuss the importance of business environment in decision-making.
Explain how business environment influences business activities and growth.
